---
title: "The Rt. Rev. Samuel Wilberforce"
---

## The Rt. Rev. Samuel Wilberforce

**Dates:** (1805-1873)

### Description

Bishop of Winchester

### Biography

He married (1828) Emily Sargent (1807-1841);  he served as Bishop of Oxford from December 1845 and, Bishop of Winchester from 1869 to his death [ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from April 6, 1875
- Letter from Aug 1st [1873]
- Letter from July 23, 1873
- Letter from June 17th 1872
- Letter from [check 1872]
- Letter from March 3d 1871
- Letter from February 16th, 1871.
- Letter from September [1870]
- Letter from Jan 31st  [1870]
- Letter from Decr 22 [1869]
- Letter from December 16 [1869]
- Letter from Decr 13th [1869]
- Letter from Novr 6 th [1869]
- Letter from October 8, 1869.
- Letter from Decr 30th [1867]
- Letter from November 4, 1867
- Letter from July 9th [1853]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
